description_long: A young adult woman stands confidently, wearing a strapless, form-fitting dress with a flared skirt and a wide belt at the waist. Her dress is complemented by high-heeled lace-up boots that reach above the ankles, adding a bold touch to her urban look. She has a tattoo visible on her upper left arm, and her arms are relaxed at her sides, with one hand resting on her hip. Her hair is straight, medium-length, and parted to the side, framing her face. The figure's posture is upright and self-assured, suitable for a city street or nightlife setting. The overall appearance is stylish and modern, with attention to detail in the clothing and accessories.
description: A stylish young woman in a strapless dress with a flared skirt, wide belt, and high-heeled boots, standing confidently with a relaxed posture. She has a visible arm tattoo and straight, medium-length hair.
description_view_0: Front view shows the strapless dress, wide belt, confident stance, and visible tattoo on the left arm.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the dress, the arm resting on the hip, and the straight hair falling past the shoulders.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the backless design of the dress, the flared skirt, and the boots' heels.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the hand on the hip and the side profile of the dress and boots.
attribute_clothing_type: strapless flared dress with a wide belt and high-heeled lace-up boots
attribute_hairstyle: medium-length straight hair with side part
